notes:
I have tried every DirectX version and every other launch option the game provides. I have also tried other people's methods on this forum. Game doesn't launch, it only shuts down Steam. 

Steam doesn't produce a proton log file which means that the crash happens after loading Vulkan shaders and before or while launching the game. 

I've checked the system logs that shows that Steam manages to verify the Steam runtime before going radio silent.
